flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at City Colleges of Chicago-Olive-Harvey College are 19% below the public certificate-predominant peer median ($31.1k vs $38.6k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at City Colleges of Chicago-Olive-Harvey College fell 34% between 2006 and 2009 (7.2% → 4.8%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at City Colleges of Chicago-Olive-Harvey College fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (53.7% → 44.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at City Colleges of Chicago-Olive-Harvey College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).
